channel.title: University of Pittsburgh on naimcinar
channel.description: Recent content in University of Pittsburgh on naimcinar

item.title: Fulbright Visiting Scholar at Pitt + Recent Talk
item.description:
I’m currently a Fulbright Visiting Scholar at the University of Pittsburgh (Pitt). I started on September 1, 2025, and I’ll be here for one year.

Last week, I gave a talk at Pitt (Agora Series) titled “Data Privacy and Advertising: Understanding User Consent Decisions in Data-Driven Environments.”

You can see the department’s announcement here:

  • LinkedIn post (University of Pittsburgh Department of Communication)
